summary: P0 Bug Fix Verification: Remix styles in Photo to Comic now produce distinct outputs. All 6 root causes addressed and verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 remix style bug is fully fixed. All 6 root causes verified: 1) guaranteed_output.py now uses style_name for filter selection via STYLE_FILTER_MAP, 2) All 3 filter types (posterize, pop_art, sketch) are used in rotations, 3) Per-panel color variation ensures unique bytes, 4) Style metadata (style_applied, filter_used) included in output, 5) Unknown styles fall back to DEFAULT_FILTER_ROTATION, 6) Prompt composer includes strong style differentiation with [STYLE — CRITICAL] block. Frontend: handleRemix auto-triggers generation, dialogue 'null' filtered out at lines 695 and 699.

root_cause_1_style_ignored.evidence: STYLE_FILTER_MAP maps each style to distinct filter rotations, generate_guaranteed_panels uses style_name parameter

root_cause_2_sketch_never_called.evidence: All 3 filters (comic_posterize, pop_art, sketch) are used across style mappings - verified by test_all_three_filters_used_across_styles

root_cause_3_posterize_too_subtle.evidence: _apply_comic_posterize now uses contrast=2.0, color=1.8, posterize=3 levels, plus per-panel color temperature variation

root_cause_4_null_dialogue.evidence: Frontend filters 'null' dialogue at lines 695 and 699: p.dialogue !== 'null'

root_cause_5_remix_two_clicks.evidence: handleRemix now calls handleGenerate(newStyle) directly at line 519

root_cause_6_weak_style_prompts.evidence: Prompt composer includes [STYLE — CRITICAL] block with TRANSFORM instruction and anti-photorealism language
